sql_array: CREATE TABLE dates_test (id Int32, date Date32);
INSERT INTO dates_test (id, date) VALUES (1, makeDate32(2024, 1, 1));
UPDATE dates_test SET date = makeDate32(2024, 100) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, date FROM dates_test WHERE date = makeDate32(2024, 1, 1);
SELECT count(*) FROM dates_test WHERE date > makeDate32(2023, 1, 1);
